meaning: v.渚靛叆瀹跺涵鐩楀彇,鎷嗗眿
examples: Describe how to housebreak a puppy.
Pet owners should housebreak their dogs and cats.
Many people including dog trainers believe that crate training a puppy is an excellent idea because it is easier to housebreak your puppy, as they do not like to soil where they sleep.
All his second wife Claire (Kelly McGillis) has to do is housebreak him.
Roll up your carpets, the dogs can be difficult to housebreak.
